### Highlights | 更新内容

- 新增两种渲染器：`原生渲染器` 和 `Metal 渲染器`，并将 `原生渲染器` 设为默认选项。
  Adds two new renderers: `Native Renderer` and `Metal Renderer`, with `Native Renderer` set as the default option.
- `原生渲染器` 使用 `VideoToolbox 解码 + 原生 Sample Buffer 呈现`，作为推荐选择，主打更低延迟、更高默认色准与稳定 HDR 播放体验。
  `Native Renderer` uses `VideoToolbox decode + native sample-buffer presentation` and is the recommended choice for lower latency, higher default color accuracy, and stable HDR playback.
- `Metal 渲染器` 使用更深的 `Metal / EDR` 呈现链路，提供 `HLG / PQ`、HDR 元数据来源、本机显示器 HDR 档案、亮度参数、光学输出倍率、HLG 观看环境、EDR 策略、色调映射策略等更完整的专业调节。
  `Metal Renderer` uses a deeper `Metal / EDR` presentation path and provides fuller professional controls for `HLG / PQ`, HDR metadata source, client HDR display profile, luminance parameters, optical output scale, HLG viewing environment, EDR strategy, and tone-mapping policy.
- `Metal 渲染器` 同时提供显示同步、帧队列目标、响应倾向与 drawable timeout 等呈现时序调节项。
  `Metal Renderer` also exposes presentation-timing controls such as display sync, frame queue target, responsiveness bias, and drawable-timeout behavior.
- 原渲染链路作为 `兼容渲染器` 保留旧视频链路，用于旧系统、兼容性问题或异常恢复场景。
  The original rendering path is retained as `Compatibility Renderer` for older systems, compatibility issues, and recovery scenarios.
- 画质增强链路新增支持 `VT 低延迟超分`、`VT 高质量超分`、`基础缩放` 与 `VT 低延迟插帧`。
  The enhancement pipeline now supports `VT Low-Latency Super Resolution`, `VT Quality Super Resolution`, `Basic Scaling`, and `VT Low-Latency Frame Interpolation`.
- 大幅缩短全屏模式下的开启串流速度。
  Significantly shortens stream startup time in fullscreen mode.
- 提供专用于 Foundation Sunshine 的主机显示扩展参数，可以在开始串流时或主机设置时选择串流显示器以及串流模式。
  Adds Foundation Sunshine-specific host display extension parameters so you can choose the target display and streaming mode from host settings or when starting a stream.

### Maintenance | 维护更新

- README 首页重新收敛成更短的核心特性入口，并把视频 / HDR / 音频 / 输入等技术实现细节收进折叠说明块里，方便先快速浏览，再按需展开查看。
  The README front page has been tightened into a shorter core-capabilities overview, with video / HDR / audio / input implementation details moved into collapsible sections so readers can scan first and expand only what they care about.
- 版本号已更新到 `1.3.7`，并补充了这一版的专用 release notes，方便继续沿用现有发布流程生成 GitHub Release 页面内容。
  The marketing version has been updated to `1.3.7`, and this release now includes dedicated curated release notes so the existing release workflow can generate the GitHub Release page cleanly.
